---
pagetitle: "About"
---

```{=html}
<nav class="nav">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a href="index.html" class="brand">EJ.</a>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="about.html" class="active">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="experience.html">Experience</a></li>
      <li><a href="projects.html">Projects</a></li>
      <li><a href="hobbies.html">Hobbies</a></li>
      <li><a href="insights.html">Insights</a></li>
    </ul>
    <a href="contact.html" class="btn-dark">Get in touch</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<main>
<div class="page reveal">
  <div class="eyebrow page-eyebrow">About</div>
  <h1 class="page-title">I turn complex data into clear, practical decisions.</h1>

  <div class="prose">
    <p>
      I'm a data and business analytics professional with experience using data to improve
      reporting, streamline workflows, and support stronger business decision-making. My
      background spans analytics, process improvement, and translating complex information
      into clear, practical insights that help teams solve operational and strategic problems.
    </p>
    <p>
      I'm currently pursuing my MS in Business Analytics at UC San Diego, where I'm continuing
      to build skills in machine learning, data-driven strategy, and applied AI. I'm especially
      interested in roles that combine technical analysis with business problem-solving.
    </p>
    <p>
      I'm drawn to how analytics, AI, and machine learning can strengthen operational efficiency,
      support strategy, and create measurable impact — particularly in Tech, FinTech, and
      Venture Capital.
    </p>
  </div>

  <div class="about-links">
    <a href="mailto:ejagdhane99@gmail.com" class="pill">Email</a>
    <a href="resume.pdf" class="pill" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Resume</a>
    <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/eesha-jagdhane" class="pill" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
    <a href="https://github.com/eeshajagdhane?tab=repositories" class="pill" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a>
  </div>

  <h2 class="block-title">How I think</h2>
  <div class="how-grid">
    <div class="how-card">
      <div class="how-num">01</div>
      <div class="how-title">Frame first</div>
      <div class="how-desc">Before touching data, get the business question right. What decision does this actually inform?</div>
    </div>
    <div class="how-card">
      <div class="how-num">02</div>
      <div class="how-title">Structure the mess</div>
      <div class="how-desc">Clean, model, and pressure-test the data until the shape of the problem is obvious.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="how-card">
      <div class="how-num">03</div>
      <div class="how-title">Communicate to act</div>
      <div class="how-desc">A chart that changes a decision beats a dashboard nobody opens. Write for the stakeholder, not the tool.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</main>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <span>Based in San Diego, CA · UCSD MS Business Analytics</span>
    <div class="footer-links">
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/eesha-jagdhane" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/eeshajagdhane?tab=repositories" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a>
      <a href="mailto:ejagdhane99@gmail.com">Email</a>
      <a href="resume.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Resume</a>
    </div>
    <span>© 2026 Eesha Jagdhane</span>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
  }, { threshold: 0.08 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => io.observe(el));
</script>
```
